title: Packit: constrain koji and bodhi jobs to fedora package
body: This helps to avoid dup packit jobs during downstream updates.

comments.body: @inknos PTAL. Should be safe to merge.
Trying a fix for CI here https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/443
VM needs to be rebuilt with newer python3.12. I'll work on it
